nautli
Diagnose Gallery Manifesto Install
English한국어日本語
Diagnose Gallery Manifesto Install FAQ GitHub Discord

Free · Read-only · One command

Paste this prompt into Claude Code (or Cursor or Codex)

Your AI can find memory files across tools and run the complete local diagnosis for you.

Run: npx nautli@latest scan

Read-only diagnosis of the AI memory files on this machine (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, Obsidian vaults and similar). Nothing is uploaded except 7 anonymous numbers. It opens a local HTML report when done — then summarize the top findings for me.

Why a prompt? You do not need to know where the folders are. Your AI does.

Do it in the browser (for Obsidian vaults)

Free · Runs in your browser

What is your AI actually reading?

Choose the folder your assistants read from. Everything is parsed in this tab. No file, name, or snippet leaves your machine.

About 30 seconds. A scan typically surfaces:

  • CLAUDE.md at ~12,000 tokens, reloaded every session
  • The same paragraph copied across 4 files
  • Stale TODO markers your AI reads as decisions

Chrome and Edge open a folder picker. Safari and Firefox use the folder upload control, which still reads locally.

This browser cannot read a local folder. Open the page in Chrome, Edge, or Safari, or run the install steps and use the command line instead.

🔒 No install, no account, no upload. Your files stay on your machine.

Reading locally

Could not finish the scan
